name: offload
description: Delegate a real-world digital task to a vetted human, straight from your AI chat. Get an instant AI quote, post the task, and track it to delivery — escrow-protected, never asks for your passwords.

tools.name: offload_get_quote
tools.description: Free, instant AI quote for a task (category, time estimate, fair price). No signup.

tools.name: offload_post_task
tools.description: Post a task to the Offload marketplace; returns an escrow-protected checkout link.

tools.name: offload_task_status
tools.description: Check the status of a posted task by ID.
